description: Tekion is a cloud-native automotive retail platform transforming dealership operations through modern software products across sales, service, CRM, and digital retail.
responsibilities: Leading engineering initiatives across core products including CMS and VMS with focus on scalability, reliability, and release excellence
Driving architecture decisions, mentoring engineers, and reviewing code to raise overall engineering standards
Owned cross-team platform integrations and delivered reusable solutions consumed by multiple product teams
Improved development velocity by reducing bugs, streamlining releases, and strengthening engineering processes
